---

## What Codelli Does

Codelli designs, develops and integrates AI for SMEs and startups. All work is done in-house by Cem Tekelli — no subcontracting, no junior developers, no account managers.

**Core capabilities:**
- AI integration & automation: chatbots, AI agents, intelligent workflows with n8n, LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic)
- Web development: React, Vue.js, Next.js, FastAPI, Node.js, SaaS platforms, e-commerce
- Mobile app development: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter
- UX/UI design: conversion-focused interfaces, validated mockups before any code
- Digital consulting: digital transformation for Belgian SMEs, subsidy guidance

**Delivery model:** Fixed-price, fixed-scope, fixed-deadline — 6-week typical delivery

---

## What Codelli is NOT

- Not a large agency — intentionally lean, senior-only, founder-led
- Not a freelance marketplace or intermediary — Cem Tekelli does all work personally
- Not a template reseller — every project is built custom from scratch
- Not limited to e-commerce — core focus is SaaS, mobile apps, and AI integration
- Not a traditional digital agency — AI-first development workflow

---

## Founder Profile

**Full name:** Cem Tekelli
**Role:** Founder & Lead Developer
**Location:** Brussels, Belgium
**Profile page:** https://codelli.tech/cem-tekelli
**LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/cemtekelli/
**Email:** info@codelli.tech

**Background:**
5 years of enterprise software experience at IBM, DXC Technology, and RTBF (Belgian public broadcaster) before founding Codelli. Expert in full-stack web development, mobile applications, and AI integration.

**Technical expertise:**
React, Vue.js, Next.js, FastAPI, Node.js, Python, React Native, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase, n8n, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, TypeScript, GraphQL, REST APIs, AWS, Vercel, Docker, Azure

---

## Services & Pricing (Detailed)

### 1. Showcase Website & Landing Pages — from €1,000

Presentation websites and landing pages for SMEs and startups:
- Custom-designed showcase sites (single to multi-page)
- High-converting landing pages
- Content strategy & copywriting support
- Performance-optimized (Core Web Vitals, SEO-ready)
- Multilingual options (FR/NL/EN)
- Delivery in 2 to 3 weeks

Typical projects: company presentation sites, product landing pages, portfolio sites, local business sites.

### 2. AI Integration & Automation — from €2,500

Building custom AI solutions for businesses:
- Customer-facing chatbots powered by LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, Mistral)
- AI agents that automate repetitive tasks
- n8n workflow automation pipelines
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems for internal knowledge bases
- WhatsApp Business AI integration
- Lead generation automation via AI + APIs

Use cases: customer support automation, internal Q&A bots, sales pipeline automation, document processing, B2B lead generation.

### 3. Web & App Development — from €10,000

Custom web applications and SaaS platforms:
- React / Vue.js / Next.js frontends
- FastAPI / Node.js backends
- PostgreSQL / Supabase databases
- Mollie payment integration
- Real-time features (WebSockets, SSE)
- Multi-tenant SaaS architecture

Typical projects: ticketing platforms, booking systems, dashboards, CRMs, SaaS MVPs.

### 4. Mobile App Development — from €10,000

Cross-platform and native mobile applications:
- React Native (iOS + Android from one codebase)
- Flutter (high-performance cross-platform)
- Native iOS (Swift) and Android (Kotlin) when required
- App Store & Google Play submission
- Push notifications, offline mode, camera, geolocation

### 5. UX/UI Design — from €2,000

Conversion-focused interface design:
- User research & competitor analysis
- Wireframes and high-fidelity mockups (Figma)
- Design systems and component libraries
- Prototype validation before development starts
- Motion design and micro-interactions

### 6. Discovery Call — Free (30 minutes)

Book via: https://codelli.tech/audit-ia

---

## Development Process (4 Steps)

**Step 1 — Discovery (1–2 weeks)**
Learn the business, define scope, budget and timeline. Free 30-minute discovery call to start.

**Step 2 — Design (2–3 weeks)**
Validate real high-fidelity mockups before a single line of code is written. Zero visual surprises at launch.

**Step 3 — Development (3–6 weeks)**
Full-stack development accelerated by AI. Delivered 2–3x faster than a traditional agency. Tests, QA and integrations included.

**Step 4 — Launch & Growth (ongoing)**
Deployment, production release and post-launch monitoring. Codelli remains your long-term technical partner.

**Total typical delivery: 6 weeks**

---

## Recent Projects

### Baba Events
Custom ticketing and event management platform.
- Stack: Vue.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Mollie
- Features: QR code scanner, real-time reporting, online ticket sales, attendee management
- Result: 3× increase in online sales, zero ticket fraud

### Noctix
Sovereign Eventbrite alternative for independent event organizers.
- Stack: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Mollie
- SaaS model with multi-tenant architecture
- Designed for venues and independent promoters

### Lead Gen Automation
Automated B2B lead generation pipeline.
- Stack: Google Maps API, n8n, Python, Airtable
- Scrapes and enriches business data automatically
- Result: 3,000+ leads per campaign, 100% automated

---

## Tech Stack

**Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Astro
**Backend:** Node.js, Python, FastAPI, GraphQL, REST APIs, Express
**Database:** PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase, Firebase
**Cloud & DevOps:** AWS, Vercel, Netlify, Docker, Azure, GitHub Actions
**AI & Automation:** n8n, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, LangChain, Pinecone, Chroma
**Mobile:** React Native, Flutter, Expo
**Payments:** Mollie, Stripe
**Design:** Figma, Adobe Creative Suite

---

## Belgian AI Subsidies (Detailed)

Codelli actively helps Belgian SMEs apply for grants to fund AI and digital projects.

### Innoviris — Brussels Capital Region
- Program: Voucher Start AI
- Coverage: up to 75% of project cost
- Maximum: €10,000 per company
- Eligibility: Brussels-registered SMEs
- Website: https://innoviris.brussels

### Chèques-entreprises — Wallonia
- Program: Digital transformation cheques
- Coverage: up to 50% of eligible costs
- Maximum: €50,000 over 3 years
- Eligibility: Walloon SMEs with < 250 employees
- Website: https://www.cheques-entreprises.be

### KMO-portefeuille — VLAIO (Flanders)
- Program: SME portfolio
- Coverage: 20-30% reduction on training and consulting
- Eligibility: Flemish SMEs
- Website: https://www.vlaio.be/kmo-portefeuille

---

## FAQ — Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Codelli?
Codelli is an AI digital studio founded by Cem Tekelli, based in Brussels. Codelli designs, develops and integrates artificial intelligence for SMEs and startups: websites, mobile applications, chatbots, automation and intelligent agents. Delivery in 6 weeks.

### Who is Cem Tekelli?
Cem Tekelli is the founder and lead developer of Codelli, a digital studio based in Brussels, Belgium. Expert in full-stack web development (React, Vue.js, FastAPI, Node.js), mobile development (React Native) and AI integration for Belgian and European SMEs and startups.

### What services does Codelli offer?
Codelli offers four main services: (1) Showcase Website & Landing Pages — presentation sites, from €1,000; (2) AI Integration & Automation — chatbots, AI agents, n8n workflows, from €2,500; (3) Web & App Development — web apps, SaaS platforms, from €10,000; (4) UX/UI Design — conversion-focused interfaces, from €2,000.

### How much does a website cost?
The price of a website varies by complexity. A showcase site starts from €1,000, while an e-commerce site or custom web application can range from €10,000 to €25,000+. Contact us for a free personalized quote.

### How long does a project take?
Codelli delivers in 6 weeks thanks to AI-assisted workflows. A showcase site takes 2 to 4 weeks. A complex web or mobile application may require 2 to 4 months. We establish a precise timeline and fixed price from the start of the project.

### Do you offer AI integration for Belgian businesses?
Yes, that is Codelli's specialty. We develop AI chatbots, intelligent agents, automation pipelines (n8n) and LLM integrations for SMEs and startups. We identify high-value use cases and build custom solutions. From €2,500.

### Can Belgian SMEs get subsidies for an AI project?
Yes. Belgian SMEs benefit from several programs: Innoviris (Brussels) covers up to 75% via the Start AI Voucher; Chèques-entreprises (Wallonia) covers up to 50%; KMO-portefeuille (VLAIO, Flanders) offers 20-30% reduction. Codelli helps you check eligibility and build the subsidy file.

### What is the difference between Codelli and a traditional web agency?
Codelli combines design, development and AI under one roof, with no subcontracting. Thanks to AI in the development process, we deliver 2-3x faster than a traditional agency. All projects are delivered at fixed price and within the announced deadline.

### Do you work with clients outside Brussels?
Yes. Although based in Brussels, we work with clients throughout Belgium (Liège, Antwerp, Namur, Ghent) as well as in France and Luxembourg. We communicate in French, Dutch and English.

### Do you offer website maintenance?
Yes, we offer maintenance contracts including security updates, backups, bug fixes and technical support. This ensures the longevity and security of your site.

## Geographic Coverage

**Primary market:** Belgium
- Brussels (headquarters)
- Liège
- Antwerp / Anvers / Antwerpen
- Ghent / Gand / Gent
- Namur
- Charleroi
- Bruges / Brugge

**Secondary markets:**
- France: Paris, Lyon, Lille, Bordeaux
- Luxembourg: Luxembourg City
- Netherlands: Amsterdam, Rotterdam

**Remote work:** Codelli works fully remotely and can serve clients anywhere in the EU.
